name: Tempting Trifle Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
Process soft coconut macaroon cookies into crumbs.
~--------------------------------------------------------------------------
Press the crumbs onto the bottom of a greased 9-inch springform pan. Bake at 325 degrees F., for 15 minutes.
Combine cream cheese and sugar in an electric mixer; beat until well blended. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition. Blend in sour cream, whipping cream, sherry, and vanilla. Pour over the crust.
Bake at 325 degrees F., for 1 hour and 10 minutes. Loosen the cake from the rim of the pan; cool before removing the rim of the pan. Chill.
Heat preserves in a saucepan over low heat until melted. Strain to remove seeds. Spoon over cheesecake, spreading to edges. Dollop with whipped cream; top with almonds.
